cases.notes: Vendored Noto Sans Thai shapes the ก้ case as a Thai run with positioned or zero-advance tone-mark behavior without promoting broader Thai shaping support.
Vendored Noto Sans Thai keeps the bounded Aก้A case split into Latn/Thai/Latn shaping runs when the reviewed Script_Extensions itemizer is injected locally by the test wave.
Vendored Noto Sans SC applies a distinct glyph ID for ア when the optional vert feature is requested, proving only bounded kana vertical-alternate evidence on the reviewed runtime path.

remainingGates.detail: Paragraph-owned dictionary word-breaking diagnostics for Thai remain absent; this wave does not claim paragraph-level segmentation or layout refinement.
Dedicated Thai refusal fixtures and stable unsupported-boundary diagnostics remain absent beyond the bounded tone-mark and mixed-script cases.
Reviewed cmap format 14 variation-selector positive or refusal evidence remains absent on the shaping route; existing Unicode-segmentation coverage is not promoted here.
Bounded Han direct-mapping and Hangul coverage or refusal rows remain absent from this review wave.
Paragraph-owned ruby and East Asian line-break refinement diagnostics remain separate gates and are not implied by this shaping-only evidence.
Ticket-local shaping-plan.json, gsub-trace.json, gpos-trace.json, shaped-glyph-run.json, cmap-map.json, and unicode-segments.json dump families remain open before done.
